text:
applies to the 5th and 6th tiers of the formulary. 

1 in 2nd digit = Tier 1 

1 in 3rd digit = Tier 2 

1 in 4th digit = Tier 3 

1 in 5th digit = Tier 4 

1 in 6th digit = Tier 5 

1 in 1st digit = Tier 6 

In 2010, the variable was a 10-character string with the digits that corresponded to tiers as follows: 

1 in 2nd digit = Tier 1 

1 in 3rd digit = Tier 2 

1 in 4th digit = Tier 3 

1 in 5th digit = Tier 4 

1 in 6th digit = Tier 5 

1 in 7th digit = Tier 6 

1 in 8th digit = Tier 7 

1
